# endIndex

**Instance Property**

The index of the final group in the row grouping.

## Declaration

```swift
var endIndex: Int { get }
```

## Retrieving an Index

- **startIndex**: The index of the initial group in the row grouping.
- **index(before:)**: Returns the index immediately before an element index.
- **index(after:)**: Returns the index immediately after an element index.
